description: Release-candidate remote-clone replay gate for non-Coinbase generalization. Uses the existing multi-repo live-case runner without relying on ignored runtime-state reports.
safety_boundaries: do not commit or push to s-aws/staterail
do not mutate protected frozen fixture source files
do not rely on ignored runtime-state reports in a clean clone
fail on route, evidence, formatter, runtime, model capability, unsupported scope, or fixture mutation gaps

cases.prompt: In {config_root}/tests/fixtures/generalization/python_service_fixture, locate the order request message handler. Read only. Return handler file, handler symbol, route or message evidence, related tests, and whether an HTTP method/path is present.
In {config_root}/tests/fixtures/generalization/python_service_fixture, find the orders table schema only. Read only. Return schema field names, model files, and source refs.
In /mnt/c/staterail_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, explain what ActionGateway does in actions/gateway.py. Read only. Include key inputs, outputs, side effects, and tests.

In /mnt/c/staterail_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, find the most relevant tests for RiskGate rejecting orders that exceed notional, leverage, product, or operator constraints. Read only. Include confidence and why each test is relevant.

In /mnt/c/staterail_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, recommend the smallest, medium, and broad pytest commands for validating changes around strategy simulation gates. Read only. Explain why each command belongs at that tier.

In /mnt/c/coinbase_testing_repo_frozen_tmp.github, explain what find_stealth_order_by_placed_order_id does in core/stealth_order_manager.py. Read only. Include key inputs, outputs, side effects, and tests.

acceptance_marker: REMOTE CLONE NON-COINBASE GENERALIZATION REPLAY PASS
